string.name: response
string.value: =I have successfully written the file to {{$node["Parse JSON"].json.path}}.

parameters.systemDirective: You are OpenClaw, processing an automation task. The user is outlining a multi-step objective for you.

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO short_term_memory (sender, content) VALUES ('user', '{{$node["Extract Input"].json.content}}'); INSERT INTO short_term_memory (sender, content) VALUES ('agent', '{{$json.response}}');

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Axiom Nexus is requesting {{$json.action}} access to external file: {{$json.fullPath}}. Allow?
